Class ETMeter

java.lang.Object
lcr.business.ETMeter
All Implemented Interfaces:
LcrMeter
public class ETMeter extends Object implements LcrMeter
Implementation of the LcrMeter interface handling SCPI command communication over a serial connection for the ET431 series hardware. * @author sylkat

      public ETMeter(String portName)
      Initializes the meter with a target serial port name. * @param portName the OS identifier for the communication port

  • Method Details

    • connect

      public void connect() throws ET431Exception
      Description copied from interface: LcrMeter
      Establishes a connection to the hardware meter. * @throws ET431Exception if the connection fails or initialization errors occur
      Specified by:
      connect in interface LcrMeter
      Throws:
      ET431Exception

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect()
      Description copied from interface: LcrMeter
      Closes the connection to the hardware meter.
      Specified by:
      disconnect in interface LcrMeter

    • isConnected

      public boolean isConnected()
      Description copied from interface: LcrMeter
      Checks the active connection status of the device. * @return true if the serial channel is open
      Specified by:
      isConnected in interface LcrMeter

    • execute

      public String execute(String command) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: LcrMeter
      Sends a raw SCPI command to the meter and reads its string response. * @param command the raw text command payload
      Specified by:
      execute in interface LcrMeter
      Returns:
      the device response string
      Throws:
      Exception - if serial transport or execution fails

    • getDeviceInfo

      public DeviceInfo getDeviceInfo() throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: LcrMeter
      Queries and parses identification info string from the instrument. * @return a DeviceInfo container instance
      Specified by:
      getDeviceInfo in interface LcrMeter
      Throws:
      Exception - if parsing or hardware handshake fails

    • fetch

      public Measurement fetch() throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: LcrMeter
      Triggers and fetches a single measurement sequence reading frame. * @return a new Measurement instance containing raw read values
      Specified by:
      fetch in interface LcrMeter
      Throws:
      Exception - if data retrieval drops or fails timeout bounds
